strengths: Demonstrated hands-on experience building event-driven systems and agentic workflows, including MCP frameworks at re:cinq.
Proven track record scaling technical systems across high-throughput environments (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby).
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) indicating deep systems intuition and ownership mindset.
concerns: Lack of explicit evidence of multi-agent AI systems in production fintech or regulated financial environments.
No clear indication of leadership experience scaling engineering teams beyond 10–15 people or developing senior technical leadership layers.
Minimal mention of financial infrastructure domains (credit risk, working capital, compliance) or regulatory AI governance frameworks.
response.justification: Bogdan brings strong systems engineering depth, event-driven architecture experience, and tangible agentic tooling contributions, but lacks demonstrated leadership in fintech-scale AI systems and regulatory compliance contexts critical for this executive role.
